title: scabiosa japonica var. tschiliensis
intro: Scabiosa japonica var. tschiliensis, also known as Japanese Scabious or Chinese Scabious, is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) native to China and Japan. The plant is used in traditional medicine and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Scabiosa japonica var. tschiliensis include soothing skin irritations, reducing inflammation, and promoting wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Scabiosa japonica var. tschiliensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used topically as creams or ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
